commands: python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel

sh -c 'for f in requirements.txt ../requirements.txt ../../requirements.txt apps/backend/requirements.txt; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then python -m pip install -r "$f"; exit $?; fi; done; echo "requirements.txt not found"; exit 1'

deploy.startCommand: cd apps/backend 2>/dev/null || cd .. 2>/dev/null || true; uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
